name: bcg-toolkit
description: Your AI agent for Learning Design. Draft branded HTML embeds and interactive SCORM activities for any LMS (Rise, NovoEd, Docebo, Moodle, Canvas) directly from Claude Desktop. Claude orchestrates the component catalog, fills in your data, and renders everything live in a local browser tab — no API keys, no data leaves your machine.
long_description: BCG U Studio turns Claude Desktop into an end-to-end Learning Design agent. Ask Claude to 'draft a 3-card summary of the AI maturity phases' and the Studio renders it live in your browser, ready to export as HTML (paste into any LMS) or as a self-editing SCORM 1.2 zip (upload to any SCORM-compatible platform). 31 HTML components (cards, timelines, KPIs, stats, SWOT, pyramids, funnels, quizzes) and 16 interactive SCORM activities (flip cards, accordions, polls, drag-to-sort, hotspot, branching scenarios). Includes BCG and BCG U brand themes plus a Custom brand editor with full Arabic/Hebrew RTL support. v0.2: Storyline Generator — turn a PPTX, PDF, or DOCX into a full course Word file (cover page, learning outcomes, modules, lessons, video scripts, knowledge checks, glossary).

tools.name: list_components
tools.description: List every HTML + SCORM component in BCG U Studio with schema and example payloads.

tools.name: open_in_toolkit
tools.description: Open a component in the BCG U Studio browser tab, pre-filled with your data.

tools.name: toolkit_status
tools.description: Check whether BCG U Studio is running locally and how many browser tabs are connected.

tools.name: suggest_component
tools.description: Recommend the best-fit components for a learning-design topic. Returns top matches with schema + starter data.

tools.name: push_journey
tools.description: Push a full learning-journey structure (title + audience + ordered modules) into the BCG U Studio Journey Builder canvas.

tools.name: check_ffmpeg
tools.description: Check whether ffmpeg + ffprobe are installed and on PATH, with an install hint if missing.

tools.name: video_info
tools.description: Inspect a local video file — returns duration, resolution, fps, codec, size via ffprobe.

tools.name: trim_video
tools.description: Trim a local video between two timecodes using ffmpeg (fast stream-copy or accurate re-encode).

tools.name: extract_thumbnail
tools.description: Extract a single-frame thumbnail from a local video (.jpg / .png / .webp) via ffmpeg.

tools.name: ingest_source
tools.description: Read a local PPTX, PDF, DOCX, MD, or TXT into structured chunks (title + body + speaker notes) for the storyline drafter.

tools.name: draft_storyline
tools.description: Turn a brief (topic + audience + duration, plus optional ingested source) into a structured course JSON: cover, learning outcomes, modules → lessons with body, component suggestion, video script, and knowledge-check questions.

tools.name: assemble_storyline_docx
tools.description: Write a course storyline JSON to a clean default Word file: cover page, course overview, per-module sections with lessons + scripts + Q&A, and an appendix with glossary and design notes.
